[[Sergeant/Legends|Sergeant]] '''Reybn''' was the [[Commanding officer/Legends|commanding officer]] on an [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[Imperial Relay Outpost V-798|communications outpost]] on the planet [[Vaal/Legends|Vaal]].

==Biography==
Stationed on Vaal for several months, he and his crew grew lazy, and preferred to sunbathe instead of writing reports. Shortly after the [[Battle of Yavin/Legends|Battle of Yavin]], he saw [[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Darth Vader]] entering the outpost with a pack of aggressive [[hyenax]] and silently taking the [[Lambda-class T-4a shuttle|Lambda-class shuttle]].

{{Char-stub}}

==Appearances==
*[[Empire 14|''Empire'' 14]] {{1st}}
